issues.description: Missing passive effect for '[DON!! x2] This Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle by <Strike> attribute Characters.' — should be a Permanent condition that prevents KO from Strike Characters when attached DON count ≥ 2

Condition 'HasRestingDon' is incorrect. The Activate ability should check 'Always' (no resource cost condition); the player chooses to activate and must have resting DON available (game state check, not DSL condition). Alternatively, if modeling resource consumption, this belongs in action logic, not trigger condition.
Action models 'Give...rested DON' as AttachDon, but should clarify target is 'up to 2' (variable count ≤ 2 from available rested DON pool). Current DSL forces exactly 2.
